tasks.subject: Task 1: Shared credential schemas + mergeSecrets
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Single source of truth for credential validation + secret-merge helper (decrypt→merge→encrypt) reused by API and seed.

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/shared/src/credentials.ts","packages/shared/src/credentials.test.ts","packages/shared/src/index.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @jigit/shared test credentials","acceptanceCriteria":["per-kind Zod validation","mergeSecrets keep/overwrite/new","never returns plaintext"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Shared config token + approvals channel
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add dashboardApiToken config and approvalsChannel constant.

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/shared/src/config.ts","packages/shared/src/config.test.ts","packages/shared/src/events.ts",".env.example"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @jigit/shared test config","acceptanceCriteria":["dashboardApiToken parsed","approvalsChannel='approvals'",".env.example documented"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: API bearer-token AuthGuard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** NestJS guard gating mutating endpoints with swappable verify step (timingSafeEqual).

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/api/src/auth/auth.guard.ts","packages/api/src/auth/auth.guard.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @jigit/api test auth.guard","acceptanceCriteria":["missing/wrong token 401","correct token true","constant-time compare"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: API credentials CRUD
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Credential CRUD with redacted reads, write-only merged secrets, per-kind validation, guarded mutations.

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/api/src/config/credentials.service.ts","packages/api/src/config/credentials.service.test.ts","packages/api/src/config/credentials.controller.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @jigit/api test credentials.service","acceptanceCriteria":["list returns secretKeys not secrets","update merges secrets","mutations guarded"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: API repo-mappings + agent-templates CRUD + ConfigModule
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Full CRUD for repo mappings & agent templates; ConfigModule wires all three; delete read-only config-view.

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/api/src/config/repo-mappings.service.ts","packages/api/src/config/repo-mappings.controller.ts","packages/api/src/config/agent-templates.service.ts","packages/api/src/config/agent-templates.controller.ts","packages/api/src/config/config.module.ts","packages/api/src/app.module.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @jigit/api test repo-mappings.service","acceptanceCriteria":["repo-mapping CRUD validates template + unique key","agent-template CRUD","config-view removed"]}
```

{"files":["packages/api/src/approvals/approvals.service.ts","packages/api/src/approvals/approvals.service.test.ts","packages/api/src/approvals/approvals.controller.ts","packages/api/src/approvals/approvals.stream.controller.ts","packages/api/src/approvals/approvals.module.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @jigit/api test approvals.service","acceptanceCriteria":["listPending with job context","decide publishes approval_resolved","stream endpoint","decide guarded"]}

{"files":["packages/worker/src/graph.ts","packages/worker/src/graph.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @jigit/worker test graph","acceptanceCriteria":["publishes approval_requested to approvals channel","per-job event unchanged"]}

{"files":["packages/dashboard/src/api/client.ts","packages/dashboard/src/api/client.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @jigit/dashboard test client","acceptanceCriteria":["token persisted to localStorage","mutations send bearer","401 mentions token","new CRUD + useApprovalsSSE"]}
